Skills Test - Pass Pre-professional Basic Skills Test requirement (Praxis Core, SAT or ACT), preferably 2 terms prior to transfer. Students who have a 3.0 GPA upon completing the AAT degree will be considered as having met the basic skills requirement at Carroll, but may need to meet additional basic skill requirements at their transfer institution. Although the Basic Skills Test is not a degree requirement at Carroll, students are encouraged to complete it successfully prior to transfer to a four-year Education program.
